en_definition: a port city in northern Germany on the Elbe River that was founded by Charlemagne in the 9th century and is today the largest port in Germany; in 1241 it formed an alliance with Lubeck that became the basis for the Hanseatic League
tr_definition: Almanya'nın kuzeyinde, Elbe Nehri üzerinde bulunan, Şarlman tarafından 9. yüzyılda kurulan ve günümüzde ülkenin en büyük limanı olan şehir.
ru_definition: Портовый город на севере Германии на реке Эльба, основанный Карлом Великим в IX веке и являющийся сегодня крупнейшим портом Германии.
